contextManagement.title: Context Management
contextManagement.description: Configure custom contexts and auto-switching rules (Process Name, Window Title)

autoContextDetection.label: Auto Context Detection
autoContextDetection.description: Automatically switch stash context based on active window
autoContextDetection.macPermissionWarning: Requires Screen Recording permission on macOS
autoContextDetection.restartNote: After granting, restart Stashpad for changes to take effect.

newStashPosition.label: New Stash Position
newStashPosition.description: Where to place new stashes and newly completed items
newStashPosition.shiftModifier: Hold Shift while adding to invert this setting temporarily

stripTagsOnCopy.label: Strip Tags on Copy
stripTagsOnCopy.description: Remove #tags when copying stash content to clipboard
stripTagsOnCopy.shiftModifier: Hold Shift while copying to invert this setting temporarily

pasteAsAttachment.label: Paste as Attachment
pasteAsAttachment.description: Number of lines before pasted text becomes an attachment
pasteAsAttachment.zeroNote: Set to 0 to always ask what to do
pasteAsAttachment.shiftModifier: Hold Shift while pasting to always paste as inline text

autostart.label: Launch on Startup
autostart.description: Automatically start Stashpad when your computer starts

visualEffects.label: Visual Effects
visualEffects.windows10Note: ⚠ Disabled by default on Windows 10 to prevent window drag lag. ⚠

uiScale.label: UI Scale
uiScale.description: Adjust the size of the user interface

switchContext.label: Switch Context
switchContext.description: Short press to switch, hold to cycle

clearCompletedDays.label: Days to Keep
clearCompletedDays.description: Days to keep completed stashes before deleting

enable.label: Enable Prompt Enhancement
enable.description: Enhance stash content using AI models

provider.label: Provider
provider.description: Choose a provider or select Custom

model.label: Model
model.description: Model name to use for enhancement

appleIntelligence.info: Apple Intelligence runs entirely on-device. Your data never leaves your Mac, and no API key or internet connection is required for enhancement.

enable.label: Enable Cloud Sync
enable.description: Synchronize your stashes and contexts across devices

endpoint.label: API Endpoint
endpoint.description: The root API endpoint for the cloud service

contexts.title: Contexts
contexts.manageDescription: Manage your contexts and auto-switching rules.
contexts.noRules: No rules defined. This context will only be active if selected manually.
contexts.noContexts: No custom contexts defined. Stashes will go to "Default".

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Describe the project. Provide information about your project, your tech stack, conventions, etc.. This will be especially helpful if you use AI enhancement.

contexts.exportContext: Export all stashes as Markdown file

importDialog.title: Import Context
importDialog.selectFileDesc: Import stashes from a Stashpad export file (.md or .zip)
importDialog.dropToImport: or drop file here to import
importDialog.duplicateTooltip: This stash appears to be a duplicate of an existing one
importDialog.noStashesFound: No stashes found in this file.
importDialog.conflictDescription: The imported context has different metadata than your current context. Please choose which values to keep.

contextSwitcher.holdShiftToCopy: Hold Shift to Copy instead of Move

queue.queueEmpty: Your stashpad is empty. Add something new to start!
queue.noActiveStashesFound: No active stashes found matching filters.
queue.completeAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to complete all active stashes in this context?

stashCard.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is {limit}.
stashCard.contentEdited: Original content was edited. Regenerate enhanced version?

editor.placeholder: Type your stash here… (Cmd+Enter to save)
editor.heading: Heading

pasteChoice.title: How would you like to paste?
pasteChoice.description: The pasted content can be added as text or saved as a file attachment.

clearConfirm.title: Clear Editor?
clearConfirm.description: This will remove all text and attachments. This action cannot be undone.

shortcutInput.ariaLabel: Keyboard shortcut input. Press Enter to record a new shortcut.

exitDialog.title: Discard Draft?
exitDialog.description: You have unsaved content in the editor. Are you sure you want to quit?

filePreview.dragOrClickToPreview: Drag to export, click to preview
filePreview.unsupportedType: Preview not available for this attachment type
filePreview.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support video playback
